usage: defOutBySection [-help] <fileName> [-addHalfWireExtensionOnPin] [-bumpAsPin] [-compPlacement] [-earlyGlobalRoute] [-fills] [-ioRow] [-netRouting] [-noComps] [-noCoreCells] [-noDieArea] [-noNets] [-noPrintWildCard] [-no_virtual_trim] [-nonDefaultRules] [-outputMaskLayers <string>] [-pBlockages] [-pins] [-rBlockages] [-rows] [-scanChains] [-selected] [-specialNetRouting] [-specialNets] [-specialRouteUserClass <string>] [-specialShape [STRIPE RING PADRING BLOCKRING FOLLOWPIN IOWIRE COREWIRE BLOCKWIRE FILLWIRE DRCFILL FILLWIREOPC BLOCKAGEWIRE NOSHAPE]] [-tracks] [-unit <unit_per_micron>] [-unplaced] [-usedVia] [-verilog_from_def_netlist_flow] [-vias] [-groups  [-noPrintGroupRegex ]]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: <fileName>
options.description: Output DEF file name

options.name: -addHalfWireExtensionOnPin
options.description: Forces the zero-extension on pins to the default half-width extension

options.name: -bumpAsPin
options.description: Writes bump cells as top-level pins in the PINS section

options.name: -compPlacement
options.description: Writes component placement and orientation information to the COMPONENTS section of the DEF file. Output is limited to instances with placed/fixed/cover status, unless -unplaced is also specified

options.name: -earlyGlobalRoute
options.description: Writes information about the wires generated by Early Global Route to the NETS section of the DEF file

options.name: -fills
options.description: Writes metal fill information to the FILLS section of the DEF file

options.name: -groups
options.description: Writes group information to the GROUPS section of the DEF file

options.name: -ioRow
options.description: Generates I/O rows based on I/O pad placement, and writes the I/O row information to the DEF file

options.name: -netRouting
options.description: Writes routing data to the NETS section of the DEF file

options.name: -noComps
options.description: Excludes component information from the DEF file

options.name: -noCoreCells
options.description: Excludes core cell information from the DEF file to reduce the data size for import into APD

options.name: -noDieArea
options.description: Excludes DIEAREA and associated FE_CORE_BOX* properties.

options.name: -noNets
options.description: Excludes net information from the DEF file

options.name: -noPrintGroupRegex
options.description: Suppresses the use of regular expressions to represent instance names

options.name: -noPrintWildCard
options.description: Suppresses the use of the wildcard format to represent special net connectivity

options.name: -no_virtual_trim
options.description: Don't write out virtual trims

options.name: -outputMaskLayers
options.description: Output MASK data on specified layers only

options.name: -pBlockages
options.description: Writes placement blockage information to the BLOCKAGES section of the DEF file

options.name: -pins
options.description: Writes pin information to the PINS section of the DEF file

options.name: -rBlockages
options.description: Writes routing blockage information to the BLOCKAGES section of the DEF file

options.name: -rows
options.description: Writes row information to the ROWS section of the DEF file

options.name: -scanChains
options.description: Writes scan chain information to the DEF file

options.name: -selected
options.description: Writes only the DEF header and COMPONENT section for instances you have selected in the EDI System main window

options.name: -specialNetRouting
options.description: Writes special net routing information to the SPECIALNET section of the DEF file

options.name: -specialNets
options.description: Writes special net information to the SPECIALNETS section of the DEF file

options.name: -specialRouteUserClass
options.description: User Class for special route

options.name: -specialShape
options.description: [STRIPE RING PADRING BLOCKRING FOLLOWPIN IOWIRE COREWIRE BLOCKWIRE FILLWIRE DRCFILL FILLWIREOPC BLOCKAGEWIRE NOSHAPE]

options.name: -tracks
options.description: Writes routing track information to the TRACKS and GCELLGRID statements of the DEF file

options.name: -unit
options.description: Unit per micron for the DEF file

options.name: -unplaced
options.description: Includes unplaced standard cell instances in the COMPONENTS section when combined with the -compPlacement option

options.name: -usedVia
options.description: Writes out used vias only to DEF file

options.name: -verilog_from_def_netlist_flow
options.description: Reconciles the names in the DEF and Verilog files generated by the loadDefFile command

options.name: -vias
options.description: Writes via information to the VIAS section of the DEF file
